scripts.build: bun run build:pkgs; bun run build:apps
scripts.build:pkgs: bun run --filter @quester/schema build; bun run --filter @quester/nodes build; bun run --filter @quester/engine build; bun run --filter @quester/cli build
scripts.build:apps: bun run --filter @quester/web build; bun run --filter @quester/docs build; bun run --filter @quester/desktop build
scripts.test: bun run --filter @quester/schema test; bun run --filter @quester/nodes test; bun run --filter @quester/engine test; bun run --filter @quester/cli test
